Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests

Class ProofDependenciesTests.DependencyMatcher

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.seqprover.tests.ProofDependenciesTests.DependencyMatcher
Enclosing class:
ProofDependenciesTests
private static class ProofDependenciesTests.DependencyMatcher extends Object
Represents expected dependencies built one piece at a time with reasonable defaults.
